installCommand: npm install && cd packages/shared && npm install && cd ../server && npm install --include=dev && cd ../dashboard && npm install
buildCommand: cd packages/shared && npx -p typescript tsc && cd ../server && npx -p typescript tsc && cd ../dashboard && npx vite build && mkdir -p ../../.vercel_static/dashboard && cp -r ../server/public/* ../../.vercel_static/dashboard/ && echo ok > ../../.vercel_static/health.txt
